["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","h2",null,{"id":"项目简介","children":"项目简介"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"本项目是 Debian 第三方多媒体软件源。"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["该项目以前的名字为 Debian Multimedia，现改名为 Deb Multimedia。注意这不是 Debian 官方项目，是为 deb-multimedia.org 的镜像，与 Debian 官方的 Multimedia 小组的区别见 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://wiki.debian.org/DebianMultimedia/FAQ","rel":"nofollow","children":"https://wiki.debian.org/DebianMultimedia/FAQ"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"使用方法","children":"使用方法"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["在 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list"}]," 中加入"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"Debian 系统版本","items":[["Debian 13 (trixie)",{"release":"trixie"}],["Debian 12 (bookworm)",{"release":"bookworm"}],["Debian 11 (bullseye)",{"release":"bullseye","backports":true}],["testing",{"release":"testing"}],["sid",{"release":"sid"}]]},{"title":"启用源码源","note":"源码源通常用于构建和调试，开启后影响更新速度","name":"src","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":"","falseValue":"# "}],"templateId":"template-0","filepath":"/etc/apt/sources.list","enableQuickSetup":true,"append":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["更改完 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"sources.list"}]," 文件后请导入 deb-multimedia-keyring，然后更新索引以生效。"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"bash"}]]}]
